revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-430

Alternative term: Reflected binary code

A binary code in which sequential numbers are represented by binary expressions each of which differs from the preceding expression in one place only.

Reference: ANSI

{{IALAFooter}}
